title: lannea edulis
intro: Lannea edulis, also known as the wild plum, is a species of shrub or small tree that belongs to the Anacardiaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lannea edulis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat a range of health problems.
